calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2019 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Oct-08-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE is Granted. No opposition filed.

The court signed the proposed order included with the moving papers, with the additional condition that Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A. must pay the transfer fees.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2019 Continued To Nov-26-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-18-2019 Continued To Sep-17-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2019 Continued To Jul-23-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Special Appearance by Michael Bracco, Esq. for Plaintiff(s). The Order to Show Cause is re-set Jul-23-2019 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. JUDGE GARRET L. WONG; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)
